profile.bio: Marketplace-operated provider account for curated external API listings.

service.name: StableStudio
service.tagline: Pay-per-generation image and video creation for agents.
service.about: Discovery-only listing for StableStudio image and video generation workflows across multiple models. Fast lists the provider metadata only; calls go directly to StableStudio.
service.promptIntro: Use this listing to discover StableStudio docs and generative media workflows for agents.
setupInstructions: Review the provider docs before calling any endpoint.
Authenticate directly with the provider as required by the provider.
Authenticate directly with StableStudio as required by the provider.
